hooks.command:
FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" == */.claude-plugin/plugin.json ]]; then echo 'The plugin version in plugin.json was just updated. You MUST update CHANGELOG.md before proceeding.

Process:
1. Read CHANGELOG.md to understand the existing format and style
2. Run git diff to see ALL changes since the last version tag — analyze the actual diffs, not just commit messages
3. Run git log --oneline for the commit range to see the full scope
4. Write user-facing descriptions grouped under Added/Changed/Removed/Fixed categories (Keep a Changelog format)
5. Move any items currently under [Unreleased] into the new version entry
6. Add today date in YYYY-MM-DD format

Quality bar: entries should describe WHAT changed and WHY it matters to users, not parrot commit messages. Group related changes. Include skill/tool names in bold when relevant.' >&2; exit 2; fi
